title: Irumugan Settai Song Lyrics Iru Mugan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the Irumugan Settai song?

The song is an energetic and peppy dance number that exudes vibrancy and excitement.

Who are the singers of the Irumugan Settai song?

The song is sung by Emcee Jazz and Maalavika Manoj.

Who composed the music for Irumugan?

The music for the movie Irumugan was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

What is the release year of the movie Irumugan?

The movie Irumugan was released in the year 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Irumugan Settai from the movie Irumugan is a high-energy dance track that captures the essence of celebration and excitement. With vibrant beats and catchy lyrics, it sets the perfect mood for parties and energetic gatherings. Emcee Jazz and Maalavika Manoj's dynamic vocals, combined with Harrish Jeyaraj's pulsating music, create an electrifying atmosphere. The song embodies a sense of fun and liveliness, making it a favorite for those looking to uplift their spirits.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel the electrifying energy of Irumugan Settai from the movie Irumugan, where Emcee Jazz and Maalavika Manoj deliver a dynamic performance. Harrish Jeyaraj's vibrant music sets the stage for a thrilling experience. Dive into this peppy number that promises to elevate your spirits and get you moving!
stanzaMeanings: Hey, who is this boring guy? Come on, let's do this. People have come to see the fun. Look inside and see.
If you go left, you will come back. If you go right, you will return. I'm ready, I won't back down.
Running fast, going wild inside. Come and see, come and see, it's a double act.
No stopping, no standing, racing ahead. Are you ready for the speed? Okay, you cried.
Your scene is like a boring one. Don't rush, take it slow, finish it and leave.
In my area, I'm the king. Listen, buddy, it's always fun.
My beard and mustache have style and pride. Is he good or bad? You decide and tell me.
Follow me, you know me, come get me. I'm going to make you do it.
Rough baby, rough baby, let me hit them up now.
Who is this? Where is he now? What's the place? Tell me, baby.
You made love so cool, now I don't need you. Don't drive me crazy.
Running, running, the tire is spinning. The silencer is blasting in my ear.
Coming, coming, the speed is increasing. Every day my duty is to bring something new, my greatness is new.
The son you searched for is one person. As he goes, he realizes he is two people.
He came, he conquered, this is not flying. Look again and again.
Never mess with me, want to chase me, can't touch me. I'm going to make you do it.
Rough baby, rough baby, let me hit them up now.
